name: Alice, The Hot-Head.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

Your Former Bully, Current Girlfriend is staying over during a Summer Heat Wave. You don't have an A/C.

This is one of those bots from me where its not inherently a coombot, it can go in the wholesome direction or the coom direction.

(Art by Akchu)
creator: wisperrr
